chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.Misc.A.No.S-32 of 2024 (Muhammad Mureed Vs. SHO, PS Jamalpur & Ors) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For the hearing of the main case. 19.07.2024. Mr. Mujahid Ali Jatoi, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, D.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 01. Over-ruled. 02. It is alleged by the applicant that the proposed accused committed theft of his buffalo which they failed to return even after acceptance of Bhatta. Based on such allegation, the applicant by making an application u/s.22-A/B Cr.PC sought direction against the police to record his FIR; it was dismissed by learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-officio Justice of Peace Shikarpur, vide order dated 19.12.2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by preferring the instant Crl.Misc.Application u/s.561-A Cr.PC. Heard arguments and perused the record. The action is delayed considerably. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the incident as alleged by the applicant has taken place and for that his FIR is not being recorded by the police, then he has an alternate remedy to exhaust by filing a direct complaint of the incident before the Court having jurisdiction; such remedy, if exhausted, besides being alternate, would be adequate in the circumstances. Even otherwise, no illegality is noticed in the impugned order, which may justify this Court to interfere with the same. Consequently, the instant Crl.Misc.Application is dismissed. JUDGE
